name: drop_prow_job_run_test_outputs_old
description: Drop the old non-partitioned prow_job_run_test_outputs table and its sequence left over from the partition swap
query: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS prow_job_run_test_outputs_old CASCADE; DROP SEQUENCE IF EXISTS prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_id_seq;

name: drop_prow_job_run_tests_old
description: Drop the old non-partitioned prow_job_run_tests table and its sequence left over from the partition swap
query: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS prow_job_run_tests_old CASCADE; DROP SEQUENCE IF EXISTS prow_job_run_tests_old_id_seq;

name: drop_test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_old
description: Drop the old non-partitioned test_analysis_by_job_by_dates table left over from the partition swap
query: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_old CASCADE;
